parameters.name: psys_cid
parameters.description: ID column from one of the supported cryptocurrencies supported by Plisio

parameters.name: fiat
parameters.description: one of the 168 fiat currencies https://plisio.net/documentation/appendices/supported-fiat-currencies

get.summary: List currencies supported for API exchange

404.description: API disabled or IP not whitelisted

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: one of the cryptocurrencies supported by Plisio (ID column from supported https://plisio.net/documentation/appendices/supported-cryptocurrencies). Optional parameter. If the parameter is not set, one of the active cryptocurrencies from the API settings is selected automatically when creating an invoice.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: any cryptocurrency float value. !!! Please, skip this field If you want to convert a fiat currency and use source_currency and source_amount fields instead

parameters.name: source_currency
parameters.description: one of the 167 fiat currencies https://plisio.net/documentation/appendices/supported-fiat-currencies

parameters.name: source_amount
parameters.description: any float value

parameters.name: allowed_psys_cids
parameters.description: comma-separated list of cryptocurrencies that allowed for payment. Customer will be able to select one of them. Example: BTC,ETH,TZEC

parameters.name: order_name
parameters.description: merchant internal order name

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: merchant internal order number. Must be unique number in your store for each new store`s order!!!

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: merchant invoice description

parameters.name: callback_url
parameters.description: merchant full URL to get invoice updates. The “POST” request will be sent to this URL (example). If this parameter isn’t set, Plisio will send a callback to URL that can be set under profile API » API settings » ”Status URL” field

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: an auto-fill invoice email. The customer will be asked to insert their email where a notification will be sent

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: en_US (we support EN language only)

parameters.name: plugin
parameters.description: Plisio’s internal field to determine integration plugin

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Plisio’s internal field to determine integration plugin version

parameters.name: redirect_to_invoice
parameters.description: Instead of JSON response user will be redirected to the Plisio's invoice page (is not working for a white-label shop)

parameters.name: expire_min
parameters.description: Interval in minutes when invoice will be expired

parameters.name: success_callback_url
parameters.description: merchant full URL to get succeed invoice. When adding json=true to the url, the response will come in the form of JSON

parameters.name: fail_callback_url
parameters.description: merchant full URL to get failed invoice. When adding json=true to the url, the response will come in the form of JSON

parameters.name: success_invoice_url
parameters.description: `To the site` invoice's button link in a case of invoice has been paid

parameters.name: fail_invoice_url
parameters.description: `To the site` invoice's button link in a case of invoice has not been paid

parameters.name: return_existing
parameters.description: Return existing invoice instead of error. Default 0

200.description: Returns InvoiceResponseDto object or InvoiceWhiteLabelResponseDto object if white-label is enabled

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: invoice id

parameters.name: psys_cid
parameters.description: destination cryptocurrency id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: invoice id

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: payer's email

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: invoice id

parameters.description: wallet address or comma separated addresses when estimating fee for mass withdrawal

parameters.name: amounts
parameters.description: amount or comma separated amount that will be send in case of mass withdraw

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: operation type

parameters.name: feePlan
parameters.description: normal or priority (https://plisio.net/documentation/endpoints/fee-plans)

parameters.description: one of the cryptocurrencies supported by Plisio (ID column from supported cryptocurrencies https://plisio.net/documentation/appendices/supported-cryptocurrencies)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: hash or multiple comma separated hashes pooled for the 'mass_cash_out'

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: any comma separated float values for the “ mass_cash_out” in the order that hashes are in “to” parameter

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: 'cash_out' or 'mass_cash_out' to send to single or multiple comma separated hashes

parameters.name: feePlan
parameters.description: normal or priority (https://plisio.net/documentation/endpoints/fee-plan)

parameters.description: ID column from one of the supported cryptocurrencies supported by Plisio

parameters.description: one of the cryptocurrencies supported by Plisio (ID column from supported cryptocurrencies https://plisio.net/documentation/appendices/supported-cryptocurrencies)

parameters.description: text search by the transaction id (txid), invoice’s order number or customer email from invoice

useWalletBalance.description: Balance of wallet that will be used to pay fee

feeFiat.description: Cryptocurrency fee value in selected fiat currency

useWalletBalance.description: Balance of wallet that will be used to pay fee

conf_target.description: estimated fee parameter to confirm the transaction in the “conf_target” blocks
estimate fee to be included into next 'conf_target' block(s)

feeRate.description: fee rate that will be used for transaction

max.description: estimated fee parameter to confirm the transaction in the “conf_target” blocks

default.description: estimated fee parameter to confirm the transaction in the “conf_target” blocks

economy.description: estimated fee parameter to confirm the transaction in the “conf_target” blocks

normal.description: estimated fee parameter to confirm the transaction in the “conf_target” blocks

priority.description: estimated fee parameter to confirm the transaction in the “conf_target” blocks

plan.description: Plan name: normal, priority or custom

conf_target.description: estimate fee to be included into next 'conf_target' block(s)

dynamicValues.description: Name of dynamic property name (ex: sat_b)

plan.description: Plan name: normal, priority or custom

dynamicValues.description: Name of dynamic property name (ex: gasPrice)

status.description: pending, completed, error, new, expired, mismatch, cancelled

source_currency.description: fiat currency - USD by default or source_currency was set

source_rate.description: Exchange rate from the “psys_cid” to the “source_currency” at the moment of transfer

fee.description: transaction fee stated in the transfer

expire_at_utc.description: timestamp in UTC timezone; it may need to be divided by 1000

created_at_utc.description: timestamp in the UTC timezone; it may need to be divided by 1000

amount.description: amount received/transferred by an operation (invoice, cash-in/cash-out)

sum.description:
Invoice: params.amount + Plisio commission (if customer pays commission) or params.amount (if merchant pays commission)
Cash-out: transfer amount + network fee
Cash-in: received amount

tx_url.description: link to the cryptocurrency block explorer

confirmations.description: Number of confirmations of this transaction. We don't update confirmation after operation is confirmed

order_number.description: Invoice order number. Must be unique number in your store for each new store`s order!!!

status.description: pending, completed, error, new, expired, mismatch, cancelled

tx_url.description: link to the cryptocurrency block explorer

psys_cid.description: one of the cryptocurrencies supported by Plisio (ID column from supported cryptocurrencies https://plisio.net/documentation/appendices/supported-cryptocurrencies)

commission_payment.description: Who pays the commission: Shop or Client

source_currency.description: Fiat currency - only USD available for the moment

source_rate.description: Exchange rate from the “psys_cid” to the “source_currency” at the moment of transfer

fee.description: Transaction fee stated in the transfer

created_at_utc.description: timestamp in the UTC timezone; it may need to be divided by 1000

tx_url.description: link to the cryptocurrency block explorer

from_currency.description: Source cryptocurrency CID, e.g. BTC, USDT_TRX.

from_amount.description: Amount the merchant pays in. Provide either from_amount or to_amount, not both.

to_amount.description: Amount the merchant wants to receive. Provide either from_amount or to_amount, not both.

amount_currency.description: Optional fiat / crypto code to interpret amounts in (e.g. USD).

min_amount.description: Minimum supported from_amount for this pair.

max_amount.description: Maximum supported from_amount for this pair, null if unlimited.

to_address.description: External destination address — where to_amount will be sent after exchange.
External recipient address (echoed from the request).

deposit_address.description:
Where the customer must send from_amount.
Partner deposit address for ChangeNow; our generated hash for SwapKit.

to_txid.description: Outbound exchange txid once partner sends to_amount.

amount.description: Invoice amount in the selected cryptocurrency

pending_amount.description: Remained amount in the selected cryptocurrency

source_currency.description: Fiat currency - only USD available for the moment

source_rate.description: Exchange rate from the “psys_cid” to the “source_currency” at the moment of transfer

expected_confirmations.description: How many confirmations expected to mark invoice completed

qr_code.description: QR code image in base64 format

verify_hash.description: Hash to verify the “POST” data signed with your SHOP_API_KEY

invoice_sum.description:
shop pays commission: invoice amount - invoice_commission
client pays commission: invoice amount

invoice_total_sum.description:
shop pays commission: invoice amount
client pays commission: invoice_commission + invoice_sum

pending_amount.description: Pending (not approve) amount in the selected cryptocurrency

remaining_amount.description: Remaining amount in the selected cryptocurrency
